title: Run full optimization cycle on test score
description:
Execute complete optimization with real data to validate end-to-end functionality.

## Prerequisites

- Test score selected (from previous task)
- Smoke tests passing

## Test Execution

Run optimization with moderate settings:
```bash
plexus procedure optimize \
  -s <scorecard-key> \
  -c <score-key> \
  --days 90 \
  --max-iterations 3 \
  --improvement-threshold 0.02
```

## Validation Checklist

During execution, verify:
- [ ] Baseline evaluation runs with RCA
- [ ] RCA output shows meaningful topic clusters
- [ ] Analyzer agent proposes logical changes
- [ ] HITL approval gate appears with clear context
- [ ] After approval, new score version created
- [ ] Version note contains hypothesis
- [ ] Evaluation runs with baseline comparison
- [ ] Metric deltas calculated correctly
- [ ] Iteration log complete
- [ ] Can continue through multiple iterations

After completion, verify:
- [ ] Final summary shows total improvement
- [ ] All iterations logged correctly
- [ ] No data corruption (score versions valid)
- [ ] Baseline ID consistent across iterations

## Success Criteria

- Completes without errors
- At least 1 iteration executes fully
- Metrics improve or stay flat (no major regressions)
- All data structures match specifications

## Documentation

Comment with:
- Procedure ID
- Number of iterations completed
- AC1 improvement (baseline → final)
- Any issues encountered
- Screenshots of HITL prompts (if helpful)

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Running Full Optimization Test

**Target Score:**
- Scorecard: AW Confirmation (ID: 731)
- Score: Transfer Call? (ID: 47086)

**Parameters:**
- Days: 180 (last 6 months of feedback)
- Max samples: 100 per evaluation
- Max iterations: 3
- Dry run: No (will make real changes)

Starting optimization now...

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Test Score Changed & Run Progress

Test score changed from Transfer Call? to **Parties Present** on AW - Confirmation scorecard.

Completed 10+ runs (2026-04-06) with iterative improvements:
- Run 4: All 3 iterations accepted (feedback +0.120, accuracy +0.135)
- Runs 5-10+: Iterative improvements to procedure including batch-parallel baseline evaluations, enhanced agent prompts with safety constraints, escalating accuracy warnings, target_accuracy early exit, enriched RCA context
- Last run interrupted by IDE crash — parallel baselines completed (feedback AC1=0.59, accuracy AC1=0.58) but procedure died before consuming results

Current optimizer state: max_samples=200, max_iterations=10, dual parallel evals working.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
## Run on 2026-04-06 (resumed after IDE crash)

Started new run: procedure 1c0ec819, PID 37582, max_iterations=3, max_samples=200.

**Baselines completed successfully:**
- Accuracy: 76.5% AC, 0.53 alignment (eval d364993b)
- Feedback: 76.0% AC, 0.52 alignment (eval bd191e2a)
- Both ran in batch-parallel mode
- RCA completed with full root cause analysis (rca_pending fix confirmed working)

**Iteration 1 issue discovered:**
- Agent's str_replace_editor failed (no match for old_str)
- Agent called done(success=true) anyway
- submit_score_code submitted unchanged YAML due to stale exchange file bug
- Created no-op version dc2f986b that was evaluated wastefully
- Bug tracked and fixed as plx-b9f057

**RCA fix verified:**
- Feedback eval completed with status=COMPLETED and full root_cause data
- Confirms rca_pending=True flag correctly suppresses premature COMPLETED from background task
